subject: PCA3D in the source code
body:
Dear developers:

I found that there is a directory in the source code repository 
https://github.com/cramerlab/warp  <https://github.com/cramerlab/warp>named 
"PCA3D".

I wondered if it performs a similar function as CryoSparc's 3DVA or what is 
the major difference between these two methods.

Thanks in advance!
